title: Define LICHEN fragmentation profile
description: Make the SCHC draft authoritative for RFC 8724 ACK-on-Error: allocate directional RuleIDs; confirm M=1,N=6,T=0; choose WINDOW_SIZE, L2 word/padding, tile size, final-tile strategy, RCS placement/input, ACK timing/C/bitmap compression, retry limits, abort behavior, and capacity consistent with constrained C state.
acceptance_criteria: Normative spec has no implementation ambiguity; all selected values have RFC citations and explicit wire diagrams.
close_reason: Defined authoritative RFC 8724 ACK-on-Error profile in commit 03a7261be: hop-by-hop signed-link operation; RuleIDs 0x78/0x79; T=0/M=1/N=6; WINDOW_SIZE=63; true bit packing; 187-byte tiles; CRC/RCS, ACK compression, retry/abort/duplicate semantics; 1281-byte minimum buffer; Rule Set Version 2; aligned link/security specs. git diff --check passed; three final independent reviews reported no in-scope findings. typos unavailable locally.
